generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control devices including actuators, smart lighting systems, and HVAC controllers explicitly modeled within BIM for adaptive control logic implementation"
]

instance SmartLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting systems implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting control as demonstrated in BOREALIS project"
]

instance HVACControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC controllers implementing bidirectional interaction with the Digital Twin via standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono)"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing real-time occupancy data embedded in BIM models for post-occupancy analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring energy consumption parameters (kWh, efficiency metrics) embedded in BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor capturing environmental parameters (e.g., room temperature) embedded in BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring lighting levels (lux) embedded in BIM models for environmental parameter tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancyFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing post-occupancy feedback from BOREALIS reinforcement learning implementations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancyFeedbackSensor
]

// C5: Data Types
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy metrics (tenant IDs, occupancy counts) extracted from BIM-enriched models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenTransformationPipeline
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Energy consumption metrics (kWh, efficiency percentages) derived from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature readings (Celsius) captured from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACOptimizationService
]

instance LightingLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting level measurements (lux) for environmental parameter tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomizableControlService
]

instance PostOccupancyFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy feedback metrics from BOREALIS reinforcement learning implementations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostOccupancyFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

// C10: Models/Data Structures
instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model containing static geometry, topology, and functional attributes of the LEED Platinum academic building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenTransformationPipeline
]

instance OperationalMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata model containing sensor configurations, control logic, and device relationships extracted via model-driven transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeSynchronizationService
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyMetricsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model containing derived energy efficiency metrics and predictive analytics outputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C11: Enablers/Tools
instance ModelDrivenTransformationPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating BIM-to-runtime artifact transformation using Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomizableControlService
]

instance RealTimeSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware infrastructure (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enabling bidirectional data flow between physical building and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataFlowManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine platform providing immersive 3D visualization for interactive building representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular service integration framework supporting incremental updates and future decentralization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceExtensibilityService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning implementation for adaptive control logic (lighting, HVAC)"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomizableControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operational parameters via sensor data integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyMetricsInsight, EnergyUsageInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy efficiency predictive modeling using historical and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyForecastAction, OptimizationRecommendation
]

instance CustomizableControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular control logic implementation for adaptive building systems (lighting, HVAC)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingControl, HVACOptimization
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization platform using Unreal Engine for stakeholder engagement"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpatialContextInsight, OccupancyVisualization
]

instance DataFlowManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing bidirectional data synchronization between physical building and Digital Twin"
]

instance ServiceExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Framework enabling modular service integration via standardized extension points"
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy metrics showing tenant distribution and space utilization patterns"
]

instance EnergyUsageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy consumption metrics with efficiency percentages for operational optimization"
]

instance EfficiencyForecastAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Predictive action recommending energy efficiency improvements based on current usage patterns"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated optimization recommendations for HVAC and lighting systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy and environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC system tuning for energy efficiency and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpatialContextInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D spatial context visualization of building occupancy and environmental parameters"
]

instance OccupancyVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of real-time occupancy patterns in Unreal Engine environment"
]

// C17: Environment
instance AcademicBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingInformationModel, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
    EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor, LightingLevelSensor, SmartLightingActuator,
    HVACControllerActuator, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PostOccupancyFeedbackSensor, ReinforcementLearningFramework,
    CustomizableControlService, AdaptiveLightingControl, HVACOptimization
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs via standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to actuate physical systems, such as adjusting lighting or HVAC settings based on reinforcement learning control policies (BOREALIS) or real-time optimization tasks. This interaction is automated and decoupled from manual intervention, ensuring seamless integration with BCS."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time** time scale, enabling synchronization of physical and virtual data at **sub-second to millisecond intervals** for immediate decision-making and control. The framework prioritizes low-latency communication to support dynamic operational adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is a **service-oriented architecture** with a central DT hub orchestrating bidirectional communication between physical assets and virtual models. It integrates:
  - **BIM-based BCS components** (e.g., sensors, actuators),
  - **Middleware layers** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto),
  - **Custom services** (e.g., reinforcement learning controls in BOREALIS),
  - **Visualization layers** (Unreal Engine).
  The constellation ensures interoperability via standardized interfaces and extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life-cycle stages** of the building: **design** (BIM-based modeling), **construction** (device integration), and **operation** (real-time monitoring and control). The framework supports transitions between phases by automating runtime configurations (e.g., sensor/control logic updates) without full redeployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** evaluating alignment between physical and virtual models,
  - **Model validation** (e.g., BIM model checks),
  - **Runtime synchronization** via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to mitigate semantic drift (e.g., via automated control logic updates).
  Validity is validated through case studies (e.g., Living Lab) and iterative refinement of BIM-enriched models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections are established via:
  - **Network protocols**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange,
  - **Middleware layers**: Coupling BIM models with IoT/BCS devices,
  - **Standardized APIs**: Enabling interoperability with external systems (e.g., BIM tools, analytics platforms).
  The architecture supports low-latency bidirectional communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with:
  - **Automated deployment**: Minimal manual intervention required, leveraging MDE for consistent, reproducible setups.
  - **Scalability**: Designed to handle individual components or entire infrastructure systems, with modular extension points for future growth.
  - **Runtime adaptability**: Supports dynamic updates to control logic or services without full redeployment, ensuring long-term maintainability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs via:
  - **Standardized extension points** enabling plug-and-play of custom services,
  - **BIM interoperability** with other AECO tools (e.g., Revit),
  - **Middleware bridges** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for interoperability with IoT/BCS platforms.
  The framework supports integration with external systems (e.g., analytics platforms) without proprietary lock-in."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  - **AECO standards**: BIM as the semantic backbone,
  - **Middleware standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange,
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE)**: Automated transformations from BIM to runtime artifacts,
  - **Service-oriented architecture**: Standardized extension points for modularity.
  The approach minimizes fragmentation by leveraging open standards."
]
